---
title: "w5l2_act"
author: "Camilla Rosour"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 

```{r}
library(mlbench)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
data(BostonHousing2)

```

Activity:

```{r}
ggplot(BostonHousing2, aes(x = medv, y = chas)) +
  geom_boxplot() + theme_classic()
```

```{r}
ggplot(BostonHousing2, aes(x = medv, y = chas)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = .44, size = 1.4, color = "pink3", median.color = "red4") + theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45)) +
  labs(x = "Median Housing Values", y = "By The Charles River?", title="Median Housing Values by Proximity to Charles River")

```
